title: I earn $80/month doing literally nothing #passiveincome
spoken_script: Two apps installed on my computer earn me $80 a month while I sleep. EarnApp and Honeygain pay you to share your unused internet bandwidth. Companies pay to route traffic through residential IPs. You just install them and forget. First payment usually hits in 3 to 4 weeks. No tasks. No surveys. No referrals needed. Just existing bandwidth you already have. Link in bio for free setup guide. Both apps are totally free to install.
